name: Gorre Dinesh Chandan Reddy

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
details: Relevant Coursework: Data Structures and Algorithms (C++), Object-Oriented Programming System(OOPS), Database Managment System(DBMS), Software Engineering,Computer Networks,Deep Learning

points: Developed and maintained multiple Data Engineering and Applied AI projects, utilizing skills in ML model development, data pipelines, and LLM-based solutions.
Built scalable RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems using vector databases, text splitters, retrievers, and Hugging Face LLM API integration.
Created production-grade Python backends, optimized prompt pipelines, and contributed to internal AI tools and automation workflows.
Designed and developed a Flask application, integrating AI capabilities for B2B SaaS sales teams to generate personalized product demos for prospects.
Deployed and managed the application on AWS EC2, ensuring scalability and reliability.

projects.title: Image-Based Entity Extraction with PyTesseract
points: Successfully employed OCR technology to extract key information from product images, achieving 56% accuracy on the test dataset.
Developed a scalable solution to handle a large dataset of 130,000 test images, extracting information from 68,000 images and identifying potential challenges in 55,000 images.

projects.title: Mars Landmark Detection System
points: Designed and developed an end-to-end deep learning project to detect landmarks in images of Mars, utilizing TensorFlow and Keras.
Trained a model to classify images into eight classes representing various Martian landmarks, achieving an accuracy of 89% on the test dataset.

achievements: Amazon ML Challenge - Top 200 out of 18500 teams
